name: SZW - Fenrir Sword
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>ＳＺＷ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>シャイニング・ゼアル・ウェポン</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－<ruby lang="jp"><rb>天聖輝狼剣</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>フェンリル・ソード</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: When this card is Normal Summoned: You can target 1 "ZW -" monster you control that is an Equip Card; Special Summon that target in Defense Position. You can target 1 "Utopia" monster you control; equip this card from your hand to that target. When the equipped monster destroys an opponent's monster by battle and sends it to the GY: You can target 1 "ZW -" monster in your GY; add that target to your hand.
mnst_eff: When this card is Normal Summoned: You can target 1 "ZW -" monster you control that is an Equip Card; Special Summon that target in Defense Position. You can target 1 "Utopia" monster you control; equip this card from your hand to that target. When the equipped monster destroys an opponent's monster by battle and sends it to the GY: You can target 1 "ZW -" monster in your GY; add that target to your hand.
eff: When this card is Normal Summoned: You can target 1 "ZW -" monster you control that is an Equip Card; Special Summon that target in Defense Position. You can target 1 "Utopia" monster you control; equip this card from your hand to that target. When the equipped monster destroys an opponent's monster by battle and sends it to the GY: You can target 1 "ZW -" monster in your GY; add that target to your hand.

action: Activates if it destroys a monster by battle
summoning: Special Summons from your Spell & Trap Zone
